items.title: Discover
items.description: We learn your business, goals, and challenges through deep discovery sessions.

items.title: Design
items.description: Architecture, wireframes, and technical specs — built before a single line of code.

items.title: Build
items.description: Agile sprints with weekly demos. You see progress constantly, not just at the end.

items.title: Scale
items.description: Launch, monitor, and iterate. We stay with you to ensure sustained growth.
